closureNotes.outcome:
Precursor beta (2 of 4 before PR 1.1 URN reconcile resumes) landed on EB main at 0d1736e (PR #313). Per v1.0.0 spec (SR PR #150 364b61a): 4 scope files. Duplicate pool/poolOptions block removed from apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts (182 to 175 lines; post-fix file SHA256 03a51d1cb84bc05fe73887dba505b113cfe132db9e184edde430e39f57a8d7e1). The intentional pool: 'forks' block with 7-line rationale comment preserved; the shadow pool: 'threads' block deleted. 0 in-PR fix commits (canonical DEC shape worked first-try; lesson from alpha absorbed). 0 --admin overrides. deploy-to-dev label fired the lane; alpha-regression 4 alias-failing tests + 110/110 GREEN at PHASE_1.

Mid-run substrate-honest correction by EB-CLI: previous partial run had left vitest.config.ts modified; CLI restored to baseline before retry. Drift-refusal SHA pin caught the dirty state; clean retry succeeded. This is exactly the drift-refusal pattern working as designed.

OUT-4 FU activity: FU-EB-VITEST-API-GATEWAY-DUPLICATE-POOL-CLEANUP-1 (P2) closed clean with resolutionRefs pointing to merge SHA 0d1736e. New FU FU-EB-PATCH-DECISION-LOG-TEMPLATE-CANONICAL-SHAPE-1 (P2) filed open tracking the chat-side template fix for future deliverables that include DEC appends.

OUT-5 DEC d-2026-06-06-vitest-api-gateway-pool-forks-canonical appended with canonical decision-log.schema.v2.json shape verified Draft 7 PASS via Python jsonschema sandbox before tarball staging.

Bonus value beyond test cleanup (per EB-CLI post-merge analysis): voxel-stream.spec.ts timeout failures may resolve as side effect of forks-pool reinstatement. Pending PHASE_1 surface verification at PR 1.1. If confirmed, the original gamma scope (voxel-stream timeout) retires without a separate deliverable.
closureNotes.overrideRecord:
One mid-run posture choice captured for the audit trail:

1. Drift-refusal SHA pin caught dirty working tree from previous partial run. Pre-tarball baseline check detected vitest.config.ts modified from the SHA pin (3c481585cbe7327a2933ee2d15e827529eea8e8e4d70a43a03e5759b3fcd903d). EB-CLI restored to baseline before retry rather than overwriting with new content. Clean retry succeeded. This is the substrate-correction discipline working at the right layer: drift detected at execution gate, not at merge or post-merge. No content lost, no scope violations, no doctrine breach.

Forward observation: beta is the first precursor to land with zero in-PR fixes. alpha had a DEC shape substrate-correction (in-PR fix commit 98859af). Beta absorbed that lesson; canonical decision-log.schema.v2.json read at authoring time, sandbox-validated before staging. Pattern: each cycle the substrate-correction discipline integrates one more layer.
